name: Capability Visibility
description: Make product scope visible as a living hierarchy, not a static backlog.
productGoal: Users instantly understand what exists and where it belongs.
userValue: Fast orientation without reading code or tickets.
notes: First trust moment when opening the product.

name: Function Inspection
description: Let users inspect one function deeply with clear product context.
productGoal: Turn scope visibility into behavioral understanding.
userValue: Confidence in what each function does and why it matters.
notes: Function remains the key operational unit.

name: Validation Cockpit
description: Provide clear test visibility and low-friction validation paths.
productGoal: Move from seen scope to verified behavior.
userValue: Validation without terminal usage or tooling overhead.
notes: API and guided UI checks are both relevant.

name: Status and Acceptance Flow
description: Track progress and acceptance in plain language.
productGoal: Make release-relevant truth visible and understandable.
userValue: Clear overview of what is ready and what is blocked.

name: Release Handoff to Agent
description: Bridge validated acceptance into safe, explicit release intent.
productGoal: Support human-in-the-loop release without git knowledge.

name: Local-First State and Portability
description: Keep data local, editable, and portable across sessions.
productGoal: No backend required for core product value.
notes: Seed JSON -> runtime state -> local persistence -> export JSON.

name: Non-Technical UX Confidence
description: Design for vibe coders and product owners first.
productGoal: High clarity with low technical tolerance requirements.
userValue: Users remain in control without becoming engineers.

name: Extensible Without Bloat
description: Prepare a clean path for growth without enterprise sprawl.
productGoal: Stay lightweight while enabling future capabilities.
userValue: Product can evolve without losing simplicity.
